query: retro vintage faded film photograph melancholy nostalgia
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / muted_faded — retro film fade, nostalgic melancholy palette

response.objective_caption: A low-angle view of a carved stone statue of a robed winged figure with crossed arms, positioned atop an angled architectural pedestal against a clear blue sky. The statue is framed from below, with the figure's upward-tilted head, draped garments, and partial wings visible alongside the textured corner of the base.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A low-angle view of a weathered stone statue depicting a robed winged figure with crossed arms, exhibiting prominent decay and degradation across its surface. Dark stains, mossy discoloration, and eroded textures cover the stone wings, garments, and facial features. The aged figure stands atop an angled architectural pedestal against a clear blue sky, with the damaged and neglected state of the material emphasizing entropy and the passage of time.
